14B-base (no steering).desc: The raw 14B base model with no instruction-following capability. Just completes text.

14B + GRAFT k=50.desc: Apply the 8B instruct-vs-base delta to 14B, restricted to top-50 tokens. Works in log-probability space.

14B + Proxy-tuning.desc: Apply the 8B instruct-vs-base delta to 14B over the full vocabulary. Simple logit addition.

8B instruct.desc: The 8B instruct model used as the delta source. For reference.

14B instruct.desc: The actual 14B instruct model. The ceiling for what steering should achieve.

4B + 0.6B proxy.desc: Apply 0.6B instruct-vs-base delta to the 4B instruct. Barely changes anything.

4B + 0.6B GRAFT k=50.desc: Same delta but restricted to top-50. Also barely changes anything.

8B base.desc: The raw 8B base model. No instruction-following.

14B base.desc: The raw 14B base model. Slightly better than 8B but still no instruction-following.

CFG w=0.5 (14B).desc: Classifier-free guidance: amplify the difference between proxy-tuned and base distributions.

CFG w=1.0 (14B).desc: Stronger classifier-free guidance. Same result as w=0.5.

Top-k boost \u03b1=5.desc: Add a constant boost to the top-k logits. Tests if uniform sharpening helps. It doesn't.

SSD (self-distill).desc: Fine-tune 4B on its own sampled outputs. Apple's method — but on IFEval, not code. Hurts.

Proxy-SSD (0.6B delta).desc: Fine-tune 4B on proxy-tuned outputs. Hurts even more.

CFG-SSD (amplified).desc: Fine-tune 4B on CFG-amplified outputs. Hurts the most.

4B max_tokens=256.desc: Standard generation length. Many prompts can't finish long responses.

4B max_tokens=512.desc: Double the generation length. +10pp just from letting the model write more. The biggest win.

Speculative decoding.desc: Use 8B instruct as draft, verify with 14B+delta. 75% acceptance rate but slower due to cache rebuild.
